title: マイルCSの後に・キングの訓示

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My race against King in the Mile Championship is
over. I feel her determination wash over me, and
my love for Umamusume goes through the roof!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
King tells me to run against lots of Umamusume
and become a true all-rounder! Oh, what golden
words of wisdom!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've decided to run tons and tons of big races.
And at the end of that grind sesh, I'm gonna take
on Opera O and Doto!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Next Episode—Digitan's Training Montage! I'm
gonna travel the country picking up new skills
wherever I go!
